channel.title: Dimension 20's Adventuring Party
channel.description: Latest releases from Dimension 20's Adventuring Party on Dropout.tv

item.title: Wonder Awaits
item.description:
The cast chat about creating wonder, Siobhan's code-cracking prowess, and naked wet polar bears.

Duration: 25:18

Tags: Dimension 20's Adventuring Party, Dimension 20, commentary, tabletop rpg, q and a, behind the scenes, game masters, role playing, RPG, Cloudward Ho!, emily axford, ally beardsley, brian murphy, zac oyama, siobhan thompson, lou wilson, brennan lee mulligan

item.title: Meaty, Meaty Combat
item.description:
The cast talk about their custom character classes, secret compartments, and ungentlemanly combat.

Duration: 19:59

Tags: Dimension 20's Adventuring Party, Dimension 20, commentary, tabletop rpg, q and a, behind the scenes, game masters, role playing, RPG, Cloudward Ho!, emily axford, ally beardsley, brian murphy, zac oyama, siobhan thompson, lou wilson, brennan lee mulligan

item.title: Pure Whimsy
item.description:
The cast talk about their first foray into the world of Gath and their skyfaring adventurers.

Duration: 24:35

Tags: Dimension 20's Adventuring Party, Dimension 20, commentary, tabletop rpg, q and a, behind the scenes, game masters, role playing, RPG, Cloudward Ho!, emily axford, ally beardsley, brian murphy, zac oyama, siobhan thompson, lou wilson, brennan lee mulligan
